Security
Auto-lock after
Lock vault after inactivity

Vault
Change master password
Export vault backup
Save an encrypted copy
Encryption Details
🔐 Classical: AES-256-GCM
🔬 Post-Quantum: CRYSTALS-Kyber-1024
🔑 KDF: Argon2id (64MB, 3 iterations, 4 threads)
🛡️ HMAC: SHA-256 tamper detection
🔄 Key rotation: Per-entry on update
💾 Format: .qvault (encrypted binary)
About Cypheria
Cypheria
Version 0.1.0 — Quantum-Resistant
Built with Rust + Tauri 2.x
Zero cloud. Zero telemetry.
Your data never leaves your device.
Add New Entry
Edit Entry
New Note
Change Master Password
Are you sure?

This action cannot be undone.

📋 Clipboard clears in 30s
